name: @supermajia/majia-guanyuan
description: Tool-agnostic Agent Skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Data analysis + ETL governance/write + custom chart development + HTML application-style dashboard generation. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes (gbrain). V1.5.0: progressive-disclosure architecture (SKILL.md router + references playbooks) saves ~1.2万 tokens per skill invocation. V2.0.0: renamed from guanyuan-majia to majia-guanyuan; command surface aligned with @guandata/guancli 1.0.19. V2.1.0: @guandata/guanvis-skill@0.1.13 internal-Nexus rollout — Part A standard card creation routed to it; new internal-nexus-install.md playbook with macOS quarantine pitfall. V2.1.1: new Part C-12 — HTML application-style dashboard generation playbook + templates/html-dashboard/ starter pack (GDHTML runtime + 2 starter modules + patch_selector_linkage.js); corrects `card preview` command surface (no more --pg-id), adds .data//.response jq compatibility. V2.1.3: refreshed v2.1.x capability map (docs/architecture.svg) — three-skill ecosystem strip (guancli / guanvis-skill / majia-guanyuan) + Part C-12 NEW highlight; docs/ now included in npm tarball. V2.1.4: command surface synced with @guandata/guancli 1.0.21 — `metric query` generalized-query flags (yoy/mom/qoq/wow/dod compare, ytd/qtd/mtd/wtd/dtd xtd, recent N periods, percentage with --percentage-dim, rank-top N with --rank-dim, last, adv-calc-json fallback), `card preview` gains `-f excel` export + `--limit` default raised to 10000 + sort lower bound 10000, and 1.0.21 fixed runtime error output no longer trailing Usage help (Part B error-capture pipelines now reliable). Manifest dep bumped from ^1.0.19 to ^1.0.21.
author: maojiebc
